known_limitations: v0.5.0 uses procedural/testable audio tones rather than authored audio assets; this keeps the prototype self-contained but is not final production sound design.
Quit is represented as a safe in-scene quit-request state for testability rather than terminating the E2E process.
Procedural/testable audio is prototype polish, not final production sound design.
External release packaging/export is outside the finalized roadmap scope.
